hero.title: D-Day the Sixth of June
hero.reason: In honor of the anniversary of D-Day, this film is a classic tribute to the bravery and sacrifice of the soldiers who landed in Normandy on June 6, 1944, and its historical significance makes it a timeless watch.
hero.blurb: This movie tells the story of the D-Day invasion from a personal perspective, focusing on the relationships between the soldiers and their loved ones, making it a compelling and emotional historical drama. With its realistic portrayal of war, D-Day the Sixth of June is a must-see for history buffs and film enthusiasts alike. Its powerful storytelling and strong performances make it a memorable experience.

released.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this superhero film is a fun and action-packed sequel that brings the beloved comic book characters to life with its impressive visual effects and engaging storyline.
released.blurb: With its lighthearted tone and exciting action sequences, Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer is an entertaining movie that will appeal to fans of the comic book series and superhero films in general. The film's visuals and special effects hold up well even today, making it a great choice for a fun movie night. The cast delivers strong performances, bringing depth and humor to their characters.

birthday.title: Wedding Crashers
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Jeremy Piven, born June 6, 1965, and this film is one of his most memorable roles, showcasing his comedic talent as a charismatic but slightly unhinged character.
birthday.blurb: Wedding Crashers is a hilarious and entertaining movie that features Jeremy Piven in a scene-stealing role, and his chemistry with the lead actors makes the film even more enjoyable. With its witty dialogue and outrageous humor, this movie is a classic comedy that will keep you laughing from start to finish.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This infamous action film is often cited as one of the worst movies ever made, with a convoluted plot, poor acting, and cringe-worthy dialogue, making it a fascinatingly bad watch.
awful.blurb: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a mind-bogglingly bad movie that will leave you questioning the sanity of the people involved in its production, and its sheer audacity makes it a morbidly fascinating watch. With its ridiculous plot twists and over-the-top action sequences, this film is a trainwreck that you won't be able to look away from.
